# Skills - Portable Skill Library for LLM Agents

> A standalone, portable library of AI skills in the Anthropic-compatible SKILL.md format. Skills work either on their own or inside larger systems (like BACH). Each skill carries its own provenance, sync state, and dependencies in YAML frontmatter -- no central control file needed.

This repository is the skill catalog of the ellmos family (Extra Large Language Model Operating Systems). Where BACH is the full text-based OS and Rinnsal is the lightweight infrastructure layer, this library is the **content** layer: reusable capability definitions that any compatible agent runtime can load. Skills can originate from BACH, be custom-written, or come from the community, and each SKILL.md declares whether it runs standalone and whether it is BACH-compatible. Author: Lukas Geiger. License: MIT.

Skill types: skill (general capability), agent (orchestrates other skills/experts), expert (deep domain knowledge), service (background service), protocol (workflow playbook), tool (executable with script). Provenance fields track origin, origin_path, origin_version, last_sync timestamps, and whether local changes diverged from the source.

## Docs

- [README (Deutsch)](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/skills/blob/master/README.md): Overview, structure, skill types, provenance, CLI quickstart
- [README (English)](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/skills/blob/master/README_EN.md): English version
- [CONVENTIONS](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/skills/blob/master/docs/CONVENTIONS.md): Frontmatter specification, full field reference
- [catalog.py](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/skills/blob/master/catalog.py): CLI for listing, filtering, sync-status, skill creation
- [LICENSE](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/skills/blob/master/LICENSE): MIT license text

## Skill categories

- [skills/](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/skills/tree/master/skills): All skills, organized by category
- [skills/_templates/](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/skills/tree/master/skills/_templates): Templates for new skills
- [skills/_examples/](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/skills/tree/master/skills/_examples): Example skills

## ellmos family (related projects)

- [USMC](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/usmc): Tier 1 -- shared memory primitive
- [Rinnsal](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/rinnsal): Tier 2 -- lightweight LLM agent infrastructure
- [BACH](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/bach): Tier 3 -- full text-based OS, loads skills from this library
- [Gardener](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/gardener): Database-based OS counterpart
- [MarbleRun / llmauto](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/MarbleRun): LLM chain-execution framework

## Optional

- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/skills/issues): Bug reports and contribution proposals
- [testing/](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/skills/tree/master/testing): Skill validation tests
